findings.finding: Task 4 conflates test-activation and behavior-change in one commit (removes xfail/skip AND lands the refactor).
findings.evidence_quote: Activate the Task-3 test by removing its @pytest.mark.xfail / @pytest.mark.skip decorator

findings.finding: Task 6 grep anchors do not assert absence of new expensive operations between or before anchors.
Task 1 parity fixtures use shallow tmp_path; pathological deep-walk cost undetectable.
findings.evidence_quote: use a path under $TMPDIR whose tree is freshly created

findings.finding: Single-machine calibration on Apple Silicon treated as universal; cross-machine/CI variance unaddressed.
Regression-detection headroom asserted but not operationalized as a formula.
Task 8 deps omit Task 6; calibration could measure pre-lock branch order.
